title: FP&A Analyst
description: Fidelity is a diversified financial services leader managing $13.3T in assets globally with trusted expertise since 1946. As an FP&A Analyst, you'll provide financial analysis driving strategic planning.
responsibilities: Build financial models for strategic planning and forecasting
Analyze actuals vs. budget and identify variances
Support annual budgeting and quarterly reforecasting cycles
Create financial analyses supporting investment decisions
Present findings to CFO and management team
Maintain financial data integrity and consolidation systems

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of financial planning, analysis, or corporate finance experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
